evidence: "Firefly was one of those series that I was immediately addicted to... The story, settings (western & space) all done well..."
"Always a Tolkien fan, they may have 'overdone this' - three movies. But have been enjoying them."
"Really a surprise - enjoyed the story (its a well told story but I like the new twist on this one) Different and very enjoyable."
"Great movie, plot was bizarre and incredible. Kept me on the edge of my seat, very well done."
"Enjoyed very much, WAY TOO SHORT- can we expect more?"
"I couldn't even make it through 30 minutes of this movie... Do not waste your time..."
"Great show, very sad it didn't last any longer."
"The book was great and this has to be one of the best done movies (book-move usually loses some story quality)."
"Always a Tolkien fan, they may have 'overdone this' - three movies."
"Firefly was one of those series that I was immediately addicted to..."
"Great movie, plot was bizarre and incredible. Kept me on the edge of my seat, very well done."
"Well done, very inspiring. Glad I purchased it."
"Really loved hearing about his early life."

summary: The user has a strong preference for drama and fantasy genres, particularly enjoying well-crafted stories with emotional depth. They value production quality and are loyal to creators like Tolkien, while also appreciating narrative twists and sensory experiences in their viewing choices.
